summary: Added browser-local Replay Lens glyph filters to Route Replay so operators can narrow long lane histories by proof, service, outcome, task, gate, or trace stages while keeping Event Proof synchronized.

queries: timeline filtering event type chips UX pattern dashboard
activity feed filter by event type UX chips
game UI legend icon filter timeline
pattern_notes: Filter chips are compact controls for selecting and filtering content.
Filtering must clearly remove or narrow content, not merely reorder it.
Icon legends and advanced filters help large game-like maps and timelines stay legible.

ui_contract: Render Replay Lens filter chips inside Route Replay with glyph icons and counts.
Keep filters browser-local and avoid snapshot or schema mutation.
Filter only Route Replay's playable stage list while leaving the raw trail and Event Stream intact.
Selecting a filter jumps to the first matching stage and synchronizes Event Proof.
NEXT and play/pause operate within the filtered stage list.
Disabled chips remain visible for zero-count event types so the legend stays complete.

red_route.evidence: Before implementation, Path Map had 0 .path-replay-filters panels, 0 data-path-replay-filter controls, and no All stages or Replay Lens text.

green_route.evidence: Rendered 7 filter chips: All 64, Proof 22, Service 6, Outcome 31, Task 0 disabled, Gate 0 disabled, Trace 5. Service selected Stage 1 of 6 with service glyphs; Outcome selected Stage 1 of 31 with outcome glyphs; All restored Stage 1 of 64.

filtered_playback.evidence: With Service active, NEXT advanced to Stage 2 of 6, replay and Event Proof kept glyph-service, and play/pause toggled while Service stayed active.

responsive.evidence: All tested viewports rendered 7 filter chips, selected Service, showed Stage 1 of 6, kept glyph-service, and reported no bad rectangles or console errors.
